2605.13467.title: PDCR: Perception-Decomposed Confidence Reward for Vision-Language Reasoning
2605.13467.paper_summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) traditionally relies on a sparse, outcome-based signal. Recent work shows that providing a fine-grained, model-intrinsic signal (rewarding the confidence growth in the ground-truth answer) effectively improves language reasoning training by providing step-level guidance without costly external models. While effective for unimodal text, we find that naively applying this global reward to vision-language (V-L) reasoning is a suboptimal strategy, as the task is a heterogeneous mix of sparse visual perception and dense textual reasoning. This global normalization creates mixture-induced signal degradation, where the training signal for visual steps is statistically distorted by the predominant textual steps. We propose Perception-Decomposed Confidence Reward (PDCR), a framework that solves this by aligning the reward structure with the task's heterogeneous nature. PDCR first performs an unsupervised skill decomposition, introducing a model-internal Visual Dependence Score to quantify visual reliance and applying a clustering algorithm to separate perception and reasoning steps. Based on this, PDCR computes a decomposed advantage by normalizing confidence gains within each skill cluster. This intra-cluster normalization provides a stable, correctly-scaled signal for both perception and reasoning. We demonstrate that PDCR outperforms the naive, global-reward formulation and sparse-reward baselines on key V-L reasoning benchmarks.
2605.13467.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習與可驗證獎勵（RLVR）傳統上依賴於稀疏的基於結果的信號。最近的研究顯示，提供細緻的模型內在信號（對真實答案的信心增長進行獎勵）有效地通過提供逐步指導來改善語言推理訓練，而無需昂貴的外部模型。雖然對於單模態文本有效，但我們發現將這種全局獎勵天真地應用於視覺-語言（V-L）推理是一種次優策略，因為該任務是稀疏的視覺感知和密集的文本推理的異質混合。這種全局正規化會產生混合引起的信號退化，其中視覺步驟的訓練信號被主要的文本步驟統計上扭曲。我們提出了感知分解信心獎勵（PDCR），這是一個通過將獎勵結構與任務的異質性質對齊來解決這個問題的框架。PDCR首先執行無監督的技能分解，介紹一個模型內部的視覺依賴分數來量化視覺依賴，並應用聚類算法來分離感知和推理步驟。在此基礎上，PDCR通過對每個技能集群內的信心增長進行正規化來計算分解的優勢。這種集群內的正規化為感知和推理提供了穩定且正確縮放的信號。我們證明了PDCR在關鍵的V-L推理基準上優於天真的全局獎勵公式和稀疏獎勵基準。
2605.13467.author: Hee Suk Yoon et.al.
2605.13467.authors: Hee Suk Yoon, Eunseop Yoon, Ji Woo Hong, SooHwan Eom, Gwanhyeong Koo, Mark Hasegawa-Johnson, Qi Dai, Chong Luo, Chang D. Yoo
